description_long: This is a rectangular wooden table with a light natural finish, featuring a flat, smooth tabletop and four sturdy legs. The front side of the table includes an open shelf divided into two compartments, suitable for storage or display. The sides and back of the table are solid panels, with the back panel featuring a woven or perforated decorative insert. The table's design is simple and functional, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation, making it suitable for urban environments such as waiting areas, lobbies, or community spaces. The wood grain is visible across all surfaces, adding a touch of warmth and natural texture. The overall construction appears robust, with the table capable of supporting moderate weight on its surface.
description: A rectangular light wood table with an open front shelf and solid sides, featuring a smooth tabletop and visible wood grain. The back panel has a woven or perforated decorative insert.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open shelf divided into two compartments beneath the tabletop.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid panel and the thickness of the tabletop, with the woven or perforated back panel visible.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the woven or perforated decorative panel and the solid construction of the back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the solid side panel and the decorative back panel.
